message:
fix(ufunc): atleast_1d scalars before column_stack promotion

crates/fnp-ufunc/src/lib.rs
  * `column_stack`: wrap each input through `atleast_1d()` before
    checking `shape.len() == 1` and promoting to a 2-D column
    vector. Previously a 0-D scalar (shape `[]`) skipped the
    promotion branch and fell through to a shape-mismatch error
    during the concatenate step. Matches
    `numpy.column_stack(...)`'s documented "1-D arrays are turned
    into 2-D columns first" wording, which NumPy interprets as
    including 0-D scalars via atleast_1d.
  * Comment above the promoted loop updated to
    "Promote scalars/1-D to 2-D column vectors, then concatenate
    along axis 1." to reflect the new behavior.

Narrow fix to a single call site; test coverage is exercised by
the existing column_stack conformance cases now that scalar inputs
are accepted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
